parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "customer_name": "{{ $json.customer_name }}",
  "invoice_number": "{{ $json.invoice_number }}",
  "date": "{{ $json.invoice_date }}",
  "due_date": "{{ $json.due_date }}",
  "line_items": {{ JSON.stringify($json.line_items.map(i => ({name:i.name, quantity:i.qty, rate:i.rate, hsn_or_sac:i.sac||'998313'}))) }},
  "notes": "{{ $json.notes || 'Thank you for your business.' }}"
}

nodes.name: Create in Zoho Invoice
nodes.notes: Enable after Zoho OAuth + ORG_ID env vars set.
